/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -ffast-math CMakeFiles/test_temporal_graph_perf.dir/tests/test_temporal_graph_perf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_temporal_graph_perf.dir/src/dtx/temporal_graph_benchmark.cc.o -o test_temporal_graph_perf  libcedar.a -llz4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lgRPC::grpc++ -lyaml-cpp::yaml-cpp third_party/braft/output/lib/libbraft.a /usr/local/lib/libbrpc.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgflags.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libleveldb.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl -lz -lrt
